name_cn:
Dior New Tote ❤ Small
This bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features a classic quilted pattern with a signature large diamond quilting. The elegant design is timeless. The handles are adjustable in length and adorned with a detachable gunmetal DIOR letter. Lined with velvet, it includes a zip pocket and a slip pocket. The side metal clasp can connect the two straps to change the bag's shape, while the long strap can be threaded through the metal ring on the other side to bring the two sides closer together. Stylish and chic!
Model: 1188
Size: 30×36×15cm
